title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Delaware North India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Delaware North India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Delaware North India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Delaware North India:
Delaware North India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delaware North India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
